verses.text: Father, glorify Thy Son; 'this is life eternal, that they might know thee the only true God, and Jesus Christ.' Life in knowing. Eternal life is the knowledge of God in Christ.
Father, glorify Thy Son; 'this is life eternal, that they might know thee the only true God, and Jesus Christ.' Life in knowing. Eternal life is the knowledge of God in Christ.
Father, glorify Thy Son; 'this is life eternal, that they might know thee the only true God, and Jesus Christ.' Life in knowing. Eternal life is the knowledge of God in Christ.
'I have glorified thee on the earth'; glorify Me with the glory I had before the world. Finished work. He looks back to His pre-existent glory.
'I have glorified thee on the earth'; glorify Me with the glory I had before the world. Finished work. He looks back to His pre-existent glory.
I have manifested Thy name to those Thou gavest Me; they have kept Thy word. Given to Christ. The disciples are the Father's gift to the Son.
I have manifested Thy name to those Thou gavest Me; they have kept Thy word. Given to Christ. The disciples are the Father's gift to the Son.
I have manifested Thy name to those Thou gavest Me; they have kept Thy word. Given to Christ. The disciples are the Father's gift to the Son.
Keep them in Thy name, 'that they may be one, as we are.' Prayer for unity. He asks that His own be kept and joined as one.
Keep them in Thy name, 'that they may be one, as we are.' Prayer for unity. He asks that His own be kept and joined as one.
Keep them in Thy name, 'that they may be one, as we are.' Prayer for unity. He asks that His own be kept and joined as one.
I kept them; the world hath hated them, 'because they are not of the world.' Set apart. The world hates those who belong to Christ.
I kept them; the world hath hated them, 'because they are not of the world.' Set apart. The world hates those who belong to Christ.
I kept them; the world hath hated them, 'because they are not of the world.' Set apart. The world hates those who belong to Christ.
Keep them from the evil; 'Sanctify them through thy truth: thy word is truth.' Made holy. God's word is the means of His people's holiness.
Keep them from the evil; 'Sanctify them through thy truth: thy word is truth.' Made holy. God's word is the means of His people's holiness.
Keep them from the evil; 'Sanctify them through thy truth: thy word is truth.' Made holy. God's word is the means of His people's holiness.
As Thou sent Me, so have I sent them; 'for their sakes I sanctify myself.' Sent and set apart. He consecrates Himself for their sake.
As Thou sent Me, so have I sent them; 'for their sakes I sanctify myself.' Sent and set apart. He consecrates Himself for their sake.
I pray for those who shall believe through their word, 'that they all may be one.' Future church. His prayer reaches to every later believer.
I pray for those who shall believe through their word, 'that they all may be one.' Future church. His prayer reaches to every later believer.
That they may be one, 'that the world may know that thou hast sent me.' Unity as witness. The oneness of believers proclaims Christ to the world.
That they may be one, 'that the world may know that thou hast sent me.' Unity as witness. The oneness of believers proclaims Christ to the world.
I will that they be with Me 'to behold my glory'; that Thy love may be in them. Final desire. He longs to have His own with Him in glory.
I will that they be with Me 'to behold my glory'; that Thy love may be in them. Final desire. He longs to have His own with Him in glory.
I will that they be with Me 'to behold my glory'; that Thy love may be in them. Final desire. He longs to have His own with Him in glory.
